The menu

Three services. Done right.

No bloated menu, no upsell games. Pick your service, pick your time, and show up. Add-ons are available on every service when you book.

Add-ons available on every service. Choose them when you book.

Add-ons

Stack any of these onto your service — just pick them when you book.

The barber

Kaleb Williams

Owner of Purpose Cuts, working out of Red To Blonde Salon in Conway. Kaleb has built a 5.0-rated book one client at a time, trusted by locals, families, and celebrity and film customers alike.

"An atmosphere of purpose, growth, and passion, served through haircuts."

House rules

Respect the chair.

Kaleb runs a tight book so every client gets his full attention. A few simple rules keep it fair for everybody.

Cash Zelle Apple Pay
Shop policy Purpose Cuts
  • By appointment only. No walk-ins.
  • Book with your first and last name.
  • 15-minute grace period. After that, the slot may be released.
  • No-shows and late cancels without communication may be charged to rebook or denied future booking.
  • Non-smoking environment. Located inside Red To Blonde Salon.
Contact

Hours

Appointment only.

Kaleb's book changes week to week, so exact openings show when you book. A typical day at the chair looks like this:

MondayClosed
Tuesday8:00 AM – 1:00 PM
Wednesday10:00 AM – 7:00 PMBreak 1:30 – 2:30 PM
Thursday10:00 AM – 3:00 PM
Friday10:00 AM – 7:00 PMBreak 1:30 – 2:30 PM
Saturday10:00 AM – 5:00 PMBreak 1:00 – 2:00 PM
SundayClosed
